title: F7 HTTP 429 throttle response (synthetic-from-official-doc)
source_doc: https://dev.socrata.com/docs/app-tokens (retrieved 2026-07-16 at M1-T001; re-verified at G1)
notes: NOT a live capture: deliberately constructed instead of bursting the shared tokenless IP pool (task risk register). The official Socrata app-tokens doc documents ONLY the HTTP 429 status for throttled requests; no body shape is documented, so the body here is empty and the connector MUST classify rate limiting on the status code alone, never on the body.
